channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Diana Marua reveals daughter Malaika is sick in hospital and seeks prayers for healing
item.description: YouTuber and influencer Diana Marua has shared that her youngest daughter, Malaika Bahati, is sick and has been admitted to hospital. In a video she posted online, Malaika is seen inside the hospital ...

item.title: Two suspects arrested in the murder of Athumani Nyanza in Dar es Salaam
item.description: The Police Force in the Dar es Salaam Special Zone has arrested two suspects in connection with the killing of Athumani Nyanza, whose body was discovered buried in a pit near his house in Chanika. Acc...

item.title: Saturday Night Live UK launches with British cast and hopes for success
item.description: The British version of the long-running American sketch show 'Saturday Night Live' premieres this weekend, aiming to recreate its transatlantic success. Filmed in London and airing live on Sky every S...

item.title: Peter Obi Alleges Government Efforts to Block His 2027 Presidential Bid, Calls for Transparency

item.title: Mamata Banerjee accuses BJP of voter suppression in West Bengal ahead of Assembly elections
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee on Saturday launched a sharp attack on Prime Minister Narendra Modi and the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), calling the prime minister the 'biggest infiltrator...

item.title: Iran's missile strike attempt on Diego Garcia: A closer look at the island's strategic role
item.description: Iran recently launched missiles at Diego Garcia, a British-controlled island in the Indian Ocean that hosts a crucial U.K.-U.S. military base. The missiles missed their target, and the exact proximity...

item.title: APC National Convention: Key Role in Party Unity and Leadership Renewal
item.description: Aderonke Atoyebi, award-winning journalist and policy analyst, don dey write about the importance of the All Progressives Congress (APC) national convention wey go hold for Eagle Square, Abuja in 2026...

item.title: Security forces launch joint operation against banditry in Meru, Isiolo, Samburu and Laikipia
item.description: Police and other security agencies have launched a multi‑agency crackdown targeting banditry in Meru, Isiolo, Samburu and Laikipia counties. The operation involves the National Police Service, Kenya D...

item.title: Alexa Ilacad Impresses Viewers with Her Transformation into Rufa Mae Quinto on YFSF 2026

item.title: Northern Lights forecast to be visible again across parts of the UK this weekend
item.description: The Northern Lights, or Aurora Borealis, illuminated skies across much of the United Kingdom on Friday night, offering a rare spectacle far beyond their usual northern latitudes. This natural display ...

item.title: Full details of UFC London 2026: Fight card, schedule and broadcast information
item.description: UFC London 2026 takes place at the O2 Arena this Saturday, 21 March, featuring a main card filled with British fighters. The headline bout pits Manchester’s Lerone Murphy against Russia’s Movsar Evloe...

item.title: Nairobi Family Seeks Help in Locating Missing Man from Nyatike
item.description: A family in Nairobi is really stressed out because their son, Tommy Otieno Ouma, also known as Atommy Nyaike Macalder, has gone missing. He disappeared back on February 16th, 2026, and his family is d...

item.title: Rajnath Singh praises Uttarakhand CM Dhami as 'Dhurandhar Dhami' on government's 4-year milestone
item.description: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh praised Uttarakhand Chief Minister Pushkar Singh Dhami at a public gathering in Haldwani, marking the completion of four years of the BJP-led Uttarakhand government. He ...

item.title: Trump warns of deploying ICE agents to assist airport security amid DHS funding standoff
item.description: On March 21, 2026, President Donald Trump threatened to send U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents to airports if Congress does not reach a deal to fund the Department of Homeland Secu...

item.title: Understanding the Difference Between Land Disputes and Land Conflicts in Tanzania
item.description: The article explains the important difference between land disputes and land conflicts in Tanzania. The writer notes that land disputes are usually limited issues, like disagreements over boundaries, ...

item.title: Challenges in managing the $100 million bushfire wildlife donations
item.description: During the 2019-20 black summer bushfires, over $100 million in donations poured in to support injured Australian wildlife, with WIRES becoming the primary beneficiary. While the organisation achieved...

item.title: Peller Demands Equal Treatment As He Calls For Shank Comics’ Arrest After Car Crash

item.title: Access Bank and King’s Trust partner to boost skills and jobs for African youths
item.description: Access Bank Plc don join hand with King’s Trust International to provide better opportunities, entrepreneurship, and sustainable livelihoods for young people for Africa. Di partnership wey dem sign fo...

item.title: Metro Manila Trains to Suspend Operations for Holy Week Maintenance
item.description: Commuters in Metro Manila should take note of adjusted train schedules this coming Holy Week in 2026. Due to annual maintenance work, the LRT-1, LRT-2, and MRT-3 lines will temporarily suspend operati...
